patch.content:
## The Biggest Build

CareTickets was SproutLab’s most ambitious feature — four build phases, a 1,089-line spec, 15 QA rounds, 310 test scenarios.

## The Data Model

21 fields per ticket. 7 templates. A 6-transition state machine: draft to active to monitoring to resolved, with paused and escalated branches.

## Notification Architecture

Main-thread notifications schedule check-in prompts. The architecture decision became canon-0045.

## Illness-Aware Metrics

When a CareTicket is active, the intelligence system adjusts expectations. A sick day’s sleep score is not compared against healthy baselines.

## The Personal Dimension

Built during a week when Ziva had her first real illness. Every field exists because a real conversation with a doctor needed that data point.

## Breaking the Monolith

By April 2026, the single-file monolith had grown past what any AI session could hold in context. The split happened across three days.

## The Nine Modules

data.js, core.js, home.js, diet.js, medical.js, intelligence.js, start.js, styles.css, and template.html.

## Build System

build.sh concatenates the modules and outputs sproutlab.html. Critical rule: cp sproutlab.html index.html before pushing.

## What Changed, What Didn’t

The split changed developer workflow but not user experience. The built output is still a single HTML file. No dependencies were added.

## Three Paths to a Bug Report

A button in Settings for deliberate reports, a long-press on the FAB for quick captures, and automatic prompts via window.onerror for crashes.

## Delivery

Bug reports formatted for WhatsApp or clipboard — the two channels Rishabh actually uses.

## Why It Exists

SproutLab’s primary user is Rishabh’s wife. When something breaks, the feedback loop needs to be instant and frictionless.

## The Session

Five open TODOs had accumulated across Codex’s build phases. This session resolved all five in one pass.

## The Fixes

Storage Usage view fixed to scan all codex-* keys. Trash view gained deleted apocrypha section. canon_updates added to snippet pipeline. QUICK_REFERENCE reconciled with the actual codebase.

## The Method

Three QA rounds, zero bugs. Codex’s patterns are stable enough that new features slot in without surprises.
